# Mobile click flooding

## Signal layer

`attribution`

## Pattern to test

many clicks before installs to steal credit.

## Graph representation

source-device-install graph.

## Useful metrics

click-to-install distribution, source click volume, retention quality.

## Verification question

Does the observed traction signal look more like independent behaviour or repeated coordinated/synthetic signalling?

## Evidence to combine

- network structure
- temporal bursts
- content similarity
- disclosure or incentive evidence
- actor history
- external reporting or platform/regulator evidence
- downstream quality of demand

## Examples / source anchors

AppsFlyer fraud documentation.

## Safe wording

"The observed pattern is consistent with `mobile click flooding` risk indicators under the tested model. This does not by itself prove intent, fraud, or illegality."
